help.title: Hilfezentrum
help.description: Finden Sie Anleitungen und Schnellzugriffe zur Nutzung der Anwendung.
help.empty: Keine Ergebnisse gefunden. Versuchen Sie ein anderes Stichwort.
help.article.quick_start_body: Überblick über Hauptnavigation, Dashboards und Moduleinstiege für Service Catalogue und C3.
help.article.services_list_body: Filtern, Volltextsuche, Export sowie Öffnen von Service-Detail oder Bearbeitung.
help.article.service_graph_body: Wie Beziehungen zwischen Services gelesen und im Graph-Kontext genutzt werden.
help.article.c3_body: Navigation im C3-Dashboard, in der Capability-Map und in verknüpften Entitäten.
help.article.profile_body: Profil verwalten, Passwort ändern und abmelden.
home.title: Servicekatalog
home.subtitle: Zentrale Einstiegsseite nach der Anmeldung. Wählen Sie die verfügbaren Module entsprechend der aktiven Installation aus.
home.card.service_catalogue.title: Servicekatalog
home.card.service_catalogue.desc: Überblick über Dienste, KPIs sowie Navigation zur Dienstliste und zum Dienstgraphen.
home.card.c3_taxonomy.title: C3-Taxonomie
home.card.c3_taxonomy.desc: Dashboard für C3-Taxonomie, Kategorien und Navigation zu C3-Listen.
home.card.c3_dashboard.title: C3 Dashboard
administration.title: Verwaltung
administration.subtitle: Benutzer, Referenzdaten, Audit und betriebliche Anwendungseinstellungen verwalten.
administration.card.users.title: Benutzer Management
administration.card.users.desc: Benutzer erstellen, zuweisen Benutzer / Inhaltsverwaltung / Admin Rollen, and verwalten AD / SSO accounts.
administration.card.groups.title: Gruppenverwaltung
administration.card.groups.desc: Groups define access rights to Service Catalogue and C3-Taxonomie Spalten and dictionaries.
administration.card.web.title: Web-Einstellungen
administration.card.web.desc: Konfigurieren ADFS / SSO trusted-Kopfzeile login and domain Kopfzeile mapping.
administration.card.import_history.title: Importhistorie
administration.card.import_history.desc: Durchsuchen import batches, issue counts, and import execution details.
administration.card.import_audit.title: Import-Audit
administration.card.import_audit.desc: Prüfung import Audit details, relation parsing outputs, and troubleshooting data.
administration.card.audit_logs.title: Audit-Logs
administration.card.installation.title: Installation and Module
administration.card.installation.desc: Installation status, active modules, repair flow, and release/schema handshake checks.
administration.card.catalogue_ref.title: Catalogue Reference Bearbeitening
administration.card.catalogue_ref.desc: Bearbeiten Service Catalogue reference dictionaries: Service Type, Status, Relation Type, Portfolio Group, and more.
administration.card.c3_ref.title: C3 Reference Bearbeitening
administration.card.c3_ref.desc: Bearbeiten C3-Taxonomie reference dictionaries, including C3 Mapping Type and C3 Capability Domain.
administration.card.c3_builder.title: C3 Capability Builder
administration.card.c3_builder.desc: Bearbeiten the final C3 Capability Map and the poster-seed-generated page title.
administration.users.provider.ad.label: AD / SSO
administration.users.provider.ad.help: Domänenanmeldung through vertrauenswürdige Header from a reverse proxy or IIS.
administration.users.role.viewer.label: Benutzer - RO
administration.users.role.editor.label: Inhaltsverwaltung - RW
administration.users.role.admin.label: Admin - alles
administration.users.title: Benutzers
administration.users.ad_signin_note: AD/SSO-Anmeldung funktioniert nur für aktive Konten vom Typ `AD / SSO`, die in der Anwendung existieren.
administration.users.search_placeholder: Nach Benutzername, Rolle, E-Mail oder AD-Identität filtern
administration.web.setting.auth.sso.head: Identity Kopfzeile
administration.web.checkbox_label: Allow automatic domain sign-in through vertrauenswürdige Header
install.page.reset_confirm: Do you really want to reset the installation? This will cancel the in-progress install and the wizard will start again from step 1. The admin account and DB data will not be affected.
install.page.status_load_failed: Laden fehlgeschlagen installation status. Verify that the middleware is running.
install.page.config_load_failed: Fehlgeschlagen to save configuration. Verify middleware availability.
install.page.admin.create_error: Fehler while creating the admin account.
install.page.admin.validation.password_c: Passwort must include uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and a special character
install.page.repair_mode_alert: The previous installation fehlgeschlagen. This wizard will repair the incomplete state.
install.page.upgrade_mode_alert: The application version is newer than the version in the database. A migration will be performed.
install.page.modules.c3_desc: Capability Taxonomy module — C3 entities, capability map, technology relations, and the C3 dashboard. Optional and can be added after installation.
install.page.data_plan.core_installation: DB schema, indexes, constraints, system Rollen, and default configuration
install.page.data_plan.reference_seed_sc: Enums, system dashboard definitions, configuration taxonomy, editor metadata
install.page.data_plan.business_data_imp: Im optionalen Schritt oder später im Adminbereich importieren
install.page.data_plan.demo_data_descrip: Creates 3 fully populated demo services (PIS, IAM, DAP) with SLAs, pricing, Rollen, relations, and mapped C3 taxonomy entities. Service names are marked with the [DEMO] prefix for easy identification.
install.page.data_plan.demo_data_note: Demo data will be erstellt automatically during installation.
install.page.data_plan.core_reference_no: Core and reference seeds are applied automatically. Business data can be uploaded in the next step or übersprungen.
install.page.execute.import_skipped_miss: Import after installation was übersprungen because this wizard run did not create a new admin account with available credentials.
install.page.execute.import_login: Signing in the admin account for data import...
install.page.execute.import_login_failed: ⚠️ Sign-in for import fehlgeschlagen — data can be imported from the admin section
install.page.execute.import_failed_gener: ⚠️ Import fehlgeschlagen — data can be imported from the admin section
install.page.execute.log.prepare_demo_da: Preparing demo data (3 demo services + C3 links)...
install.page.execute.log.import_skipped_: ⚠️ Import after installation was übersprungen because this wizard run did not create a new admin account with available credentials.
install.page.execute.log.import_login: Signing in the admin account for data import...
install.page.execute.log.import_login_fa: ⚠️ Sign-in for import fehlgeschlagen — data can be imported from the admin section
install.page.execute.log.import_failed_g: ⚠️ Import fehlgeschlagen — data can be imported from the admin section
install.page.config.https_mode: HTTPS mode - force HTTPS in generated links
install.page.config.secrets_note: 🔒 Secrets are never displayed in plain text. Konfiguration will be stored in DB (app_config).
install.page.secrets.note: Secrets are validated by the middleware on startup. We only show validation results, never the secret values themselves.
install.page.secrets.passwords_note: 🔒 Passworts and tokens must never be stored in plaintext, source code, or the image. We recommend Docker Compose secrets mounted as /run/secrets/<name>.
install.page.admin.password_policy: 🔒 The password must be at least 10 characters long and contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and a special character.
install.page.connectivity.title: Konnektivität test
install.page.connectivity.subtitle: We verify database reachability, write permissions, and the presence of the platform schema.
install.page.modules.title: Module activation
install.page.modules.subtitle: Service Catalogue Core is mandatory and kann nicht be disabled. The C3-Taxonomie module is optional and can be activated now or later in the admin section.
install.page.modules.core_desc: The application core: service list, detail, editor, import, dashboard, relations, and governance. Cannot be disabled.
install.page.data_plan.title: Datenpakete
install.page.data_plan.subtitle: Data installation is split into three layers. Core and reference seeds are mandatory. Business data are optional and can be imported at any time.
install.page.upload.title: Business data import (optional)
install.page.upload.subtitle: Upload one or more Dateis with services. Each Datei is processed as a separate batch. This step can be übersprungen and the import can be done later from the admin section.
install.page.upload.drop_files: Drop Dateis here or click to choose
install.page.upload.hint: CSV, XLSX, or JSON · Multiple Dateis at once · Max 50 MB per Datei
install.page.upload.import_batch_note: Each Datei is processed as a separate import batch. Records with the same service_id are aktualisiert (upsert), and new Datensätze are inserted.
install.page.preview.analysis: Analysis of {{count}} {{noun}} — record counts, Spalten, warnings.
install.page.preview.analysis_one: Analysis of {{count}} Datei — record counts, Spalten, warnings.
install.page.preview.analysis_many: Analysis of {{count}} Dateis — record counts, Spalten, warnings.
install.page.preview.csv_requires_data_r: CSV muss include a Kopfzeile and at least one data row
install.page.preview.service_type_missin: Column service_type_code/service_type is fehlend — Datensätze will be imported without a type
install.page.preview.no_files: No Dateis to import. Continuing to installation.
install.page.preview.import_skipped: Import übersprungen. The system will be initialized with empty business data. You can import later from the admin section.
install.page.preview.ready_for_import_on: ✅ {{count}} Datei is bereit for import — {{Zeilen}} Datensätze will be processed after installation.
install.page.preview.ready_for_import_ma: ✅ {{count}} Dateis are bereit for import — {{Zeilen}} Datensätze will be processed after installation.
install.page.preview.failed_one: {{count}} Datei fehlgeschlagen to load and will be übersprungen. You can import it later from the admin section.
install.page.preview.failed_many: {{count}} Dateis fehlgeschlagen to load and will be übersprungen. You can import them later from the admin section.
install.page.execute.title: Run installation
install.page.execute.subtitle: Everything is bereit. Installation will activate modules, persist configuration, and switch the system to READY.
install.page.execute.import_skipped: Überspringenped — data can be imported later in the admin section
install.page.result.ready_desc: The system is in READY state. The application is bereit for operation.
install.page.result.failed_desc: Check the errors and start the repair flow.
install.page.result.warning: This page will not be shown again as the default entry after you leave it. Installation and module verwaltenment remains available from the admin section → Installation & Module.
install.page.result.summary_import_skipp: Überspringenped — data can be imported later in the admin section
install.page.welcome_subtitle: This wizard will guide you through the first run of the application. I detected the installation mode and prepared the erforderlich steps. The full process takes about 5–10 minutes.
install.page.setup_token_placeholder: Paste the setup token if the backend requires it
install.page.setup_token_hint: The token is sent only to mutating install endpoints. Without it, the secure bootstrap stays locked.
install.page.reset_description: The installation is incomplete. If the wizard stops working correctly (for example after a restart), it can be safely reset and started again. Existing database data will not be gelöscht.
install.page.config_subtitle: Set the core runtime parameters. Secrets (JWT, DB) are loaded from Compose environment and mounted secrets, so they kann nicht be changed here.
install.page.secrets_subtitle: Check that erforderlich secrets are provided through a safe channel (Compose secrets or env).
install.page.admin_subtitle: Enter credentials for the first system administrator. The password will be stored as a secure hash, never in plain text.
install.page.admin_exists_warning: An active admin account existiert bereits in the database. This wizard is intended for a clean installation.
install.page.connectivity_subtitle: Verify database availability and write access before continuing the installation.
install.page.start_rate_limit: Too many requests. Try again in 30 seconds. If the issue persists, restart the middleware.
install.page.start_locked: The installation is locked from a previous attempt. Click "Reset installation" below and try again.
install.page.reset_error: Fehler while resetting the installation. Verify middleware availability.
auth.login.subtitle: Melden Sie sich an, um fortzufahren
auth.login.sso_denied: The domain account was recognized, but no active application account exists for it.
user_info.title: Mein Profil
user_info.first_login_note: Your first sign-in requires a password change. Complete it below before continuing to the application.
user_info.owned_services_load_failed: Owned services could not be loaded — the /services?owner= filter may not be supported by this backend version.
user_info.owned_services_table.title: Title
auth.errors.expired_token: Token abgelaufen, please sign in again
auth.errors.password_change_required: The first administrator must change their password.
auth.login.errors.ad_account: This account uses domain sign-in through AD/SSO.
auth.login.errors.local_password_missing: This account does not have a local password set.
auth.sso.errors.missing_identity: Die Domänenidentität wurde nicht an die Anwendung übergeben.
auth.sso.errors.no_active_account: The domain user does not have an active application account.
auth.sso.errors.missing_trusted_proxy_se: The trusted-proxy secret for SSO is fehlend.
auth.sso.errors.invalid_trusted_proxy_se: The trusted-proxy secret for SSO is invalid.
auth.sso.errors.boundary_header_missing: SSO trusted-proxy boundary Kopfzeile is not configured. Set AUTH_SSO_TRUSTED_PROXY_HEADER.
auth.sso.errors.boundary_secret_missing: SSO trusted-proxy boundary is not configured. Set AUTH_SSO_TRUSTED_PROXY_SHARED_SECRET.
auth.sso.errors.boundary_secret_required: The trusted-proxy secret for SSO is fehlend.
auth.sso.errors.boundary_secret_invalid: The trusted-proxy secret for SSO is invalid.
auth.refresh.errors.revoked_token: Refresh token is invalid or has been revoked.
auth.password.errors.too_short: The new password must be at least 10 characters long.
auth.password.errors.policy: The new password must include uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and a special character.
auth.password.errors.ad_account: This account uses domain sign-in and its local password kann nicht be changed.
auth.rate_limit.login: Too many sign-in attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
install.rate_limit: Too many installation requests. Try again in a moment.
install.errors.setup_token_required: The setup token is fehlend or invalid.
install.errors.db_unavailable: The database is not yet available or has not been initialized.
install.errors.already_ready: Installation is albereit complete. Use the admin section for repair or upgrade.
install.errors.start_required: Installation has not been started. Call /install/start first.
install.errors.admin_required_before_fin: The first admin account must be erstellt in the install wizard before installation can be completed.
install.errors.missing_required_fields: Benutzername, displayName, email, and password are erforderlich.
install.errors.demo_ready_only: Demo data can only be seeded in READY state. Current state: {{status}}
install.messages.reset_completed: Installation state has been reset. Start the wizard again.
install.errors.locked: Installation is albereit locked by {{lockedBy}} since {{lockAcquiredAt}}
import.rate_limit: Too many imports. Try again in 5 minutes.
import.errors.payload_required: Payload must contain items[] or ServiceCatalog[].
import.errors.csv_text_required: Request body must be CSV text.
import.errors.csv_requires_header: CSV muss have a Kopfzeile and at least one data row.
import.errors.report_not_found: Import contract report for the given hash was nicht gefunden
import.errors.missing_required_fields: Überspringenped - service_id or title is fehlend.
import.messages.service_sla_parsed: Parsed service-level SLA from raw text
taxonomy.errors.c3_data_object_not_found: C3 Data Object was nicht gefunden
taxonomy.errors.c3_technology_interactio: C3 Technology Interaction was nicht gefunden
taxonomy.errors.target_missing_code_fiel: Target {{targetKey}} does not define a code field
taxonomy.errors.capability_builder_item_: C3 Capability Builder item was nicht gefunden
taxonomy.errors.cannot_delete_with_child: The item kann nicht be gelöscht while it has child Datensätze
taxonomy.errors.primary_capability_incom: The primary C3 capability of an active service must be complete.
taxonomy.errors.invalid_level_dynamic: level must be an integer from 1 to {{maxLevel}}
taxonomy.errors.parent_id_not_found: The parent_id item was nicht gefunden
taxonomy.errors.parent_domain_mismatch: Parent and child must belong to the same domain
taxonomy.errors.child_level_greater: Child level must be greater than the parent level
taxonomy.errors.parent_cycle: The selected parent_id creates a cycle
taxonomy.errors.spiral_duplicate: A spiral with this code existiert bereits
taxonomy.errors.xlsx_body_required: Request body must be an XLSX Datei
taxonomy.errors.target_detection_failed: Fehlgeschlagen to determine the C3-Taxonomie target from target_key or the XLSX sheet name.
taxonomy.errors.sheets_required: The request body must contain a sheets[] array
taxonomy.errors.invalid_domain_code: Domain code does not exist in ref_c3_capability_domain.
taxonomy.errors.invalid_level: Level must be an integer from 1 to 20.
taxonomy.errors.same_parent_page_id: Parent ID must not be the same as Page ID.
taxonomy.errors.root_level_mismatch: A root item without Parent ID must have level 1.
taxonomy.errors.child_level_mismatch: An item with Parent ID kann nicht have level 1.
taxonomy.errors.parent_not_found: Parent ID was nicht gefunden in the database or in the imported Datei.
c3.import.errors.invalid_modification_da: The modification_date field is not a valid date and will be stored as NULL.
nav.persona_hint: Passt die Anwendungsansicht an die Nutzerrolle an; Systemberechtigungen ändern sich dadurch nicht.
c3.dashboard.title: C3 Dashboard
c3.dashboard.lead: Governance-Cockpit für Fähigkeiten und C3-Daten, abgestimmt mit Katalog und Betrieb.
c3.dashboard.by_item_type_hint: Balken anklicken, um die C3-Liste zu filtern
c3.dashboard.by_status_hint: Segment anklicken, um die C3-Liste zu filtern
catalogue.unavailable: Katalog-Dashboard ist nicht verfügbar — Middleware prüfen.
catalogue.title: Katalog
catalogue.lead: Ein klares Cockpit für tägliche Entscheidungen: Veröffentlichbarkeit, Readiness und Dienste mit Handlungsbedarf.
catalogue.attention.title: Neu & benötigt Aufmerksamkeit
catalogue.attention.lead: Sortiert nach der größten Readiness-Lücke des Dienstes.
catalogue.evidence.title: Aktions-Evidenztabelle
catalogue.evidence.hint: Zeigt nur Dienste, die die heutige Entscheidung beeinflussen.
catalogue.empty.ready_desc: Kein aktiver Service hat niedrige Readiness, fehlende Beschreibung, fehlendes C3-Mapping oder fehlendes Pricing.
catalogue.inbox.title: Inbox
catalogue.inbox.empty_desc: Aktuell warten keine Services auf deine Aktion.
operations.title: Operations
operations.lead: Mantine-ähnliches Operations-Cockpit: Metadatenrisiko, Ownership, Pricing Patrol und C3 Coverage Gaps.
user_info.preferences_desc: Sprache und Persona steuern die Anwendungssicht für die tägliche Arbeit.
user_info.persona_desc: Die Persona ändert die UX-Sicht, nicht die Sicherheitsrechte.
operations.board.title: Operational Readiness Board
operations.board.lead: Was die Katalogqualität blockiert und was heute geschlossen werden kann.
operations.incomplete.title: Unvollständige Metadaten
operations.incomplete.empty: Alle Dienste liegen über dem Schwellenwert.
operations.pricing.title: Pricing Patrol
operations.owners.title: Fehlende Eigentümer
operations.top_completeness.title: Beste Vollständigkeit
operations.lifecycle.title: Deprecated & retired
operations.c3_gap.title: C3 Mapping Gap
capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.lead: Level-3 Decision Dashboards für Spiral Readiness, Gaps und Overlaps.
capabilities.decision.title: Capability für Entscheidung auswählen
capabilities.decision.lead: Jede Karte öffnet Coverage, Overlaps, Gaps und Konsolidierungssignale.
capabilities.evidence.title: Readiness-Evidenz
capabilities.evidence.hint: Karten werden aus importierter C3-Taxonomie und Spiral Membership generiert.
spirals.title: FMN Spirals
spirals.decision.title: Spiral für Fulfillment Plan auswählen
spirals.decision.lead: Jede Spiral zeigt Coverage Heatmap, Top Gaps und Service Fulfillment Plan.
spirals.evidence.title: Spiral-Evidenz
c3.dashboard.graph.title: Graphische Entscheidungsvorschau
c3.dashboard.graph.lead: Coverage, Dependency Flow und Konsolidierungsmatrix in der freigegebenen Mantine-like Richtung.
fmn_air_c2.error: FMN Air C2 Coverage konnte nicht geladen werden.
fmn_air_c2.title: Application Coverage und Rationalisierung
fmn_air_c2.lead: Verbindet FMN-Verfahrens- und Serviceanweisungen mit C3-Entitäten und Service-Mappings. Capability Manager sehen, was eine Anwendung abdeckt, was fehlt und wo Duplikate bestehen.
fmn_air_c2.service_placeholder: Zum Beispiel ABC, DEF oder service_id
fmn_air_c2.empty.services: Kein Dienst mit C3-Mappings zu FMN Air C2-Anforderungen gefunden.
fmn_air_c2.empty.duplicates: Für den aktuellen Filter ist keine doppelte Coverage sichtbar.
c3.list.lead: Tabellarische C3-Taxonomieübersicht mit allen Spalten aus den Taxonomy-XLSX-Berichten und Links zu verbundenen Elementen.
c3.list.empty: Keine Elemente entsprechen den aktuellen Filtern.
c3.list.delete_confirm: C3-Element „{{title}}“ löschen?\nDiese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
c3.list.table.title: Titel
service_editor.c3.preview.title: Coverage-Auswirkungs-Vorschau
service_editor.c3.preview.empty: Wähle eine Level-3-C3-Fähigkeit, um den Spiral-Impact vor dem Speichern zu schätzen.
service_editor.c3.readiness.title: Veröffentlichungsbereitschaft
